description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, open-plan design, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped green areas. The front includes a driveway with two parked cars, a small lawn, and a palm tree, leading to a covered entrance. The rear of the property showcases a private backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and additional greenery. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor living spaces to the outdoor areas. The roof is flat, with minimal overhangs, and the exterior is finished in light pastel colors with white trim. The overall design emphasizes accessibility, comfort, and integration with outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped front yard, driveway, and a backyard pool, featuring large windows and open living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entrance, small lawn, and palm tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, backyard pool, patio, and open lawn areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio seating, and garden, with the driveway and cars visible to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, palm tree, and the rear of the bungalow with large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
